question.text: Section 15EB prescribes penalties for defaults by which categories of intermediaries?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Section 15EB specifically covers investment advisers and research analysts who fail to comply with SEBI regulations or directions. The penalty range is minimum one lakh rupees per day, maximum one crore rupees. **The Trap:** Stock broker penalties are under Section 15F, mutual fund penalties under 15D/15E. Section 15EB was specifically added for IAs and RAs. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Each intermediary category has its own penalty section: 15D/15E (MF/AMC), 15EA (AIF/InvIT/REIT), 15EB (IA/RA), 15F (stock broker). Know which applies to your entity.
